title: アオハル杯4戦目・強豪チーム、撃破！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We overcome our previously undefeated rival,
winning round four of the Unity Cup. Rice Shower
is eager to keep up the momentum and seize
victory again in our next bout.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse, however, won't
make it easy. After seeing our progress, they're
determined not to let us beat them.
